matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Quick TV: App crashes when opening last reel
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Trending → Quick TV.
3. Open Quick TV list.
4. Tap the last reel.
Issue: App crashes on opening the last reel.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Info-In-Graphics: App crashes when downloading last card after View More
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Hamburger menu → Govt In Action → Info-In-Graphics.
3. Scroll and tap View More.
4. Scroll to end and open the last card.
5. Tap Download.
Issue: App crashes when downloading the last card.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Info-In-Graphics: Downloading broken images crashes the app
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Hamburger menu → Govt In Action → Info-In-Graphics.
3. Select filters (Elections/Empowering the Poor/Environment/India First).
4. Open any broken image.
5. Tap Download.
Issue: Downloading a broken image causes app crash.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Trending: “Namo AI” (AI tile) opens white screen
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Trending → horizontal scroll to AI tile.
3. Tap AI tile.
Issue: White screen appears instead of loading the AI section.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Know the Leader: AI panel appears briefly then disappears
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Hamburger menu → Know the Leader (or similar).
Issue: AI section appears briefly and disappears; user can’t access it.

matches.title: Login button not working on Safari browser
matches.repro_steps: Open Safari 17 → Go to login page → Enter credentials → Click login → Button does not trigger API

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Login: Google sign-in not working
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. Tap Login.
3. Select Continue with Google.
4. Complete Google auth.
Issue: Google login fails (user not signed in).

matches.title: Kio DAM: Wrong error shown when logging into disabled department (“undefined Please try again!”)
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open Kio DAM.
2. Enter an email onboarded in multiple departments but disabled in one.
3. Select the disabled department.
Issue: Wrong error popup “undefined Please try again!” and user is redirected.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Home: Seva Parva banner “Open” button does nothing
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app.
2. On Home, find Seva Parva banner.
3. Tap Open.
Issue: Banner action does not open the intended section.

matches.title: Android:MDA Connect:Merchandise: Login gate inconsistent between Home banner and menu navigation
matches.repro_steps:
1. Open the MDA Connect app without login.
2. Tap “Book Collection” banner on Home (prompts login).
3. Open Hamburger → Get Involved → Merchandise → Book.
Issue: Same page is accessible without login via menu, but not via banner.
